series_metadata.series_description: These documents represent unsuccessful bid proposals for contracts of audits of public offices as awarded by the Auditor of States office. Records may include but are not limited to: Request for Proposal (RFP) tracking sheet; the RFP document; pre-bid attendance sheet; technical and cost proposals submitted by the winning IPA firm; bid scoring sheets; quality assurance reports; documents related to the selection of the winning IPA firm; memorandum of agreement; documents related to any contract modifications; correspondence related to the IPA bidding process (letter of intent, client recommendation letter, award letter, related e-mails and any other related correspondence).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: while needed ; Electronic: from date contract is awarded
